channel.title: How to deploy in AWS Amplify
channel.description:
Hello,
Is it possible to deploy frontity using AWS amplify? If yes, how?
I have managed deploy my app locally and on an various instances using node.js bitnami stack, but I have failed in deploying it using AWS amplify, AWS app runner or AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
I have tried literately everything but unsuccessfully.

item.title: How to deploy in AWS Amplify
item.dc:creator: F34R
item.description:
Hello,

Is it possible to deploy frontity using AWS amplify? If yes, how?

I have managed deploy my app locally and on an various instances using node.js bitnami stack, but I have failed in deploying it using AWS amplify, AWS app runner or AWS Elastic Beanstalk.

I have tried literately everything but unsuccessfully.

Read full topic
item.source: How to deploy in AWS Amplify
